observation_text: NIFTY closed higher with volatility compressed with broad participation.
theory_summary: NIFTY's rally persists despite reduced volatility, buoyed by widespread buying interest. This continuity remains weakly supported under compressed volatility. Unresolved tension: Participation levels, while currently robust, may be unsustainable if deterioration sets in.
reflection_summary: Observed continuation remains insufficiently tested under volatility expansion.
